title: taraxacum cyrtum
intro: Taraxacum cyrtum, also known as the dwarf dandelion or bent dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and deeply toothed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cyrtum are attributed to its ability to support digestion, reduce stress, and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically.
